/usr/bin/ar qc libgal.a CMakeFiles/gal.dir/basic_gal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/draw_panel_gal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gl_context_mgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/newstroke_font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/origin_viewitem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/painter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/text_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/worksheet_viewitem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/color4d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/gal_display_options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/graphics_abstraction_layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/hidpi_gl_canvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/stroke_font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/geometry/hetriang.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/view/view_controls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/view/view_overlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/view/wx_view_controls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/view/zoom_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/opengl_gal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/gl_resources.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/gl_builtin_shaders.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/vertex_item.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/vertex_container.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/cached_container.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/cached_container_gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/cached_container_ram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/noncached_container.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/vertex_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/gpu_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/antialiasing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/opengl_compositor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/opengl/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/cairo/cairo_gal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/cairo/cairo_compositor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gal.dir/gal/cairo/cairo_print.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgal.a
